commit_message:
[verilog] Add missing dependency in `divui` [verilog] Add missing dependency in `divui` The generated verilog for `handshake.divui` depends on the `oehb_dataless` module but did not state it as such in the RTL config json. Simulation would therefore fail due to the module not being generatetd.

This PR fixes that issue and adds a corresponding test case.

Fixes https://github.com/EPFL-LAP/dynamatic/issues/773
